user.title: Add an Expiration Item
user.description: Configure a new item to track its expiration.

data_description.name: A descriptive name for the item, e.g. Kitchen Sponge.
data_description.days_max: How many days before this item needs to be replaced or checked.
data_description.alert_threshold: How many days before expiration the status switches to warning.
data_description.hours_max: If set (>0), adds an hours-remaining sensor and a timed calendar event. Day sensors stay in days.

error.days_min_one: Days until expiration must be at least 1.
error.threshold_too_high: Alert threshold must be less than days until expiration.

abort.already_configured: An item with this name is already configured.

init.title: Update Expiration Settings
init.description: Adjust the settings for this item.

data_description.days_max: How many days before this item needs to be replaced or checked.
data_description.alert_threshold: How many days before expiration the status switches to warning.
data_description.hours_max: If set (>0), adds an hours-remaining sensor and a timed calendar event.

error.days_min_one: Days until expiration must be at least 1.
error.threshold_too_high: Alert threshold must be less than days until expiration.
